description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a flat roof and a combination of brick and large industrial-style windows. The front facade includes a prominent garage door, a main entryway with glass double doors, and a sign above the entrance, suggesting a possible mixed-use or live-work space. The upper level is partially open, revealing a spacious interior with office furniture, lounge areas, and visible staircases. The exterior is landscaped with several trees and a paved sidewalk, enhancing its urban integration. The windows are arranged in large horizontal bands, maximizing natural light and providing a contemporary aesthetic. The overall structure is robust, with clean lines and minimal decorative elements, emphasizing functionality and modern urban living.
description: A modern, flat-roofed brick house with large industrial windows, a garage, and landscaped sidewalk, featuring a spacious, open-plan interior.
description_view_0: Side view showing large horizontal windows, brick facade, and a glimpse of the open-plan interior with office furniture.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entryway with glass doors, garage door, signage, and two trees flanking the entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by a large flat roof, brick wall, and expansive windows, with minimal landscaping visible.
description_view_3: Angled view revealing the open upper level, interior layout with desks and lounge areas, and partial exterior landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows in horizontal bands
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with glass double doors, no steps, flanked by trees, and a sign above the entrance.
